tEn: QServe: W4A8KV4 Quantization and System Co-design for Efficient LLM Serving
tZh: QServe: W4A8KV4量化与系统协同设计实现高效LLM服务
sEn: QServe achieves up to 3.5x throughput improvement and 3x cost reduction for LLM serving via W4A8KV4 quantization and system co-design.
sZh: QServe通过W4A8KV4量化与系统协同设计，实现LLM服务吞吐量提升最高3.5倍，成本降低3倍。
absEn: Quantization can accelerate large language model (LLM) inference. Going beyond INT8 quantization, the research community is actively exploring even lower precision, such as INT4. Nonetheless, state-of-the-art INT4 quantization techniques only accelerate low-batch, edge LLM inference, failing to deliver performance gains in large-batch, cloud-based LLM serving. We uncover a critical issue: existing INT4 quantization methods suffer from significant runtime overhead (20-90%) when dequantizing either weights or partial sums on GPUs. To address this challenge, we introduce QoQ, a W4A8KV4 quantization algorithm with 4-bit weight, 8-bit activation, and 4-bit KV cache. QoQ stands for quattuor-octo-quattuor, which represents 4-8-4 in Latin. QoQ is implemented by the QServe inference library that achieves measured speedup. The key insight driving QServe is that the efficiency of LLM serving on GPUs is critically influenced by operations on low-throughput CUDA cores. Building upon this insight, in QoQ algorithm, we introduce progressive quantization that can allow low dequantization overhead in W4A8 GEMM. Additionally, we develop SmoothAttention to effectively mitigate the accuracy degradation incurred by 4-bit KV quantization. In the QServe system, we perform compute-aware weight reordering and take advantage of register-level parallelism to reduce dequantization latency. We also make fused attention memory-bound, harnessing the performance gain brought by KV4 quantization. As a result, QServe improves the maximum achievable serving throughput of Llama-3-8B by 1.2x on A100, 1.4x on L40S; and Qwen1.5-72B by 2.4x on A100, 3.5x on L40S, compared to TensorRT-LLM. Remarkably, QServe on L40S GPU can achieve even higher throughput than TensorRT-LLM on A100. Thus, QServe effectively reduces the dollar cost of LLM serving by 3x. Code is available at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/omniserve.
absZh: 量化可以加速大语言模型（LLM）推理。在INT8量化之外，研究社区正在积极探索更低精度，如INT4。然而，最先进的INT4量化技术仅能加速低批量、边缘LLM推理，无法在高批量、基于云的LLM服务中带来性能提升。我们发现了一个关键问题：现有的INT4量化方法在GPU上对权重或部分和进行反量化时，会产生显著的运行时开销（20-90%）。为了解决这一挑战，我们引入了QoQ，一种W4A8KV4量化算法，采用4位权重、8位激活和4位KV缓存。QoQ代表拉丁语中的4-8-4。QoQ由QServe推理库实现，并取得了实测加速。驱动QServe的关键洞察是，GPU上LLM服务的效率受到低吞吐量CUDA核心操作的严重影响。基于这一洞察，在QoQ算法中，我们引入了渐进式量化，可以在W4A8 GEMM中实现低反量化开销。此外，我们开发了SmoothAttention，以有效缓解4位KV量化带来的精度下降。在QServe系统中，我们执行计算感知的权重重排序，并利用寄存器级并行性来减少反量化延迟。我们还使融合注意力变为内存受限，从而利用KV4量化带来的性能提升。因此，与TensorRT-LLM相比，QServe在A100上将Llama-3-8B的最大可达到服务吞吐量提升了1.2倍，在L40S上提升了1.4倍；在A100上将Qwen1.5-72B提升了2.4倍，在L40S上提升了3.5倍。值得注意的是，L40S GPU上的QServe甚至可以达到比A100上的TensorRT-LLM更高的吞吐量。因此，QServe有效地将LLM服务的美元成本降低了3倍。代码可在https://github.com/mit-han-lab/omniserve获取。

contrib.en: Introduces QoQ, a W4A8KV4 quantization algorithm with progressive group quantization to enable low-overhead dequantization on INT8 tensor cores.
contrib.zh: 提出QoQ算法，采用渐进式分组量化，在INT8张量核心上实现低开销反量化。

contrib.en: Proposes SmoothAttention to mitigate accuracy loss from 4-bit KV cache quantization by smoothing key outliers.
contrib.zh: 提出SmoothAttention，通过平滑键异常值减轻4位KV缓存量化的精度损失。

contrib.en: Designs QServe system with compute-aware weight reordering and register-level parallelism to reduce dequantization latency.
contrib.zh: 设计QServe系统，采用计算感知权重重排序和寄存器级并行性以减少反量化延迟。

contrib.en: Achieves up to 2.4x throughput improvement on A100 and 3.5x on L40S over TensorRT-LLM for LLM serving.
contrib.zh: 在A100上实现高达2.4倍、L40S上3.5倍的吞吐量提升，优于TensorRT-LLM。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that QServe on L40S can outperform TensorRT-LLM on A100, reducing serving cost by 3x.
contrib.zh: 证明L40S上的QServe可超越A100上的TensorRT-LLM，将服务成本降低3倍。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to Ampere and Hopper GPU architectures; results may not generalize to other hardware.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于Ampere和Hopper GPU架构；结果可能不适用于其他硬件。

limits.en: Quantization accuracy degradation still exists compared to FP16, especially for smaller models.
limits.zh: 与FP16相比，量化精度仍存在下降，尤其对于较小模型。

limits.en: Progressive group quantization requires careful protective range tuning to avoid overflow.
limits.zh: 渐进式分组量化需要仔细调整保护范围以避免溢出。

limits.en: SmoothAttention assumes no query quantization; may not extend to fully quantized attention.
limits.zh: SmoothAttention假设查询未量化；可能不适用于完全量化注意力。

limits.en: System optimizations are specific to CUDA and may not port to other frameworks or backends.
limits.zh: 系统优化特定于CUDA，可能无法移植到其他框架或后端。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capability across a broad spectrum of tasks, exerting a profound influence on our daily lives.
items.zh: 大语言模型（LLM）在广泛的任务中展示了卓越的能力，对日常生活产生了深远影响。

items.en: However, the colossal size of LLMs makes their deployment extremely challenging, necessitating the adoption of quantization techniques for efficient inference. State-of-the-art integer quantization algorithms can be divided into three categories: 8-bit weight and 8-bit activation (W8A8), 4-bit weight and 16-bit activation (W4A16), 4-bit weight 4-bit activation (W4A4) quantization. The former two methods are considered nearly lossless in terms of accuracy. In contrast, W4A4 quantization introduces a notable accuracy degradation, although it is anticipated to offer superior throughput in return by mapping its computations onto high-throughput 4-bit tensor cores. Unfortunately, this anticipated performance boost has not been consistently observed across current GPU platforms. For instance, the state-of-the-art W4A4 serving system, Atom [44], exhibits 20-25% lower performance than its W4A16 and W8A8 counterpart in TensorRT-LLM when running the Llama-2-7B [34] model on A100 GPUs. That said, the research community has yet to find a precision combination superior to W4A16 and W8A8 for efficient cloud LLM serving.
items.zh: 然而，LLM的巨大规模使其部署极具挑战性，必须采用量化技术以实现高效推理。最先进的整数量化算法可分为三类：8位权重和8位激活（W8A8）、4位权重和16位激活（W4A16）、4位权重和4位激活（W4A4）量化。前两种方法在精度上被认为是几乎无损的。相比之下，W4A4量化引入了显著的精度下降，尽管它通过将计算映射到高吞吐量的4位张量核心，有望提供更高的吞吐量。不幸的是，这种预期的性能提升在当前GPU平台上并未一致观察到。例如，最先进的W4A4服务系统Atom在A100 GPU上运行Llama-2-7B模型时，性能比TensorRT-LLM中的W4A16和W8A8对应系统低20-25%。也就是说，研究社区尚未找到一种优于W4A16和W8A8的精度组合，用于高效的云LLM服务。

items.en: In this paper, we reveal a critical observation: current 4-bit integer quantization methods experience significant overhead, ranging from 20% to 90%, during the dequantization of weights or partial sums on current-generation GPUs. For example, W4A16 quantization performs computation on FP16 tensor cores while the weights are in INT4, so weight dequantization is required in the GEMM kernel. On the other hand, for W4A4 quantization, to achieve reasonable accuracy, W4A4 methods must apply per-group quantization to both weights and activation, sharing FP16 scaling factors on a sub-channel basis. For example, the state-of-the-art W4A4 quantization method, QuaRot [2], reports a significant 0.2 perplexity degradation after switching from per-group quantization to per-channel quantization. This per-group quantization design requires an integer to floating-point dequantization for partial sums (since INT4 tensor cores produce INT32 partial sums), which operates on the slower CUDA cores within the sequential main loop of W4A4 GEMM. On data center GPUs like A100, a CUDA core operation is as expensive as 50 INT4 tensor core operations.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们揭示了一个关键观察：当前4位整数量化方法在当代GPU上对权重或部分和进行反量化时，会产生20%到90%的显著开销。例如，W4A16量化在FP16张量核心上执行计算，而权重为INT4，因此GEMM内核中需要权重反量化。另一方面，对于W4A4量化，为了达到合理的精度，W4A4方法必须对权重和激活都应用逐组量化，在子通道基础上共享FP16缩放因子。例如，最先进的W4A4量化方法QuaRot报告，从逐组量化切换到逐通道量化后，困惑度显著下降了0.2。这种逐组量化设计需要对部分和进行整数到浮点数的反量化（因为INT4张量核心产生INT32部分和），这在W4A4 GEMM的顺序主循环中在较慢的CUDA核心上运行。在像A100这样的数据中心GPU上，一次CUDA核心操作的成本相当于50次INT4张量核心操作。

items.en: Therefore, reducing overhead on CUDA cores is crucial for achieving optimal throughput in LLM serving. Guided by this principle, we introduce QoQ (Quattuor-Octō-Quattuor, or 4-8-4 in Latin) algorithm which quantizes LLMs to W4A8KV4 precision: 4-bit weights, 8-bit activations and 4-bit KV caches. Additionally, we present QServe, which provides efficient system support for W4A8KV4 quantization.
items.zh: 因此，减少CUDA核心上的开销对于实现LLM服务的最佳吞吐量至关重要。基于这一原则，我们引入了QoQ（Quattuor-Octō-Quattuor，拉丁语中意为4-8-4）算法，该算法将LLM量化为W4A8KV4精度：4位权重、8位激活和4位KV缓存。此外，我们提出了QServe，为W4A8KV4量化提供高效的系统支持。

items.en: In the QoQ algorithm, we introduce progressive group quantization. This method first quantizes weights to 8 bits using per-channel FP16 scales, then quantizes these 8-bit intermediates to 4 bits. This approach ensures that all GEMMs are performed on INT8 tensor cores. Additionally, we mitigate accuracy loss from KV4 quantization through SmoothAttention, which shifts the challenge of activation quantization from keys to queries, the latter of which are not quantized.
items.zh: 在QoQ算法中，我们引入了渐进式分组量化。该方法首先使用逐通道FP16缩放因子将权重量化为8位，然后将这些8位中间值量化为4位。这种方法确保所有GEMM都在INT8张量核心上执行。此外，我们通过SmoothAttention减轻了KV4量化的精度损失，该技术将激活量化的挑战从键转移到查询，而查询不被量化。

items.en: In the QServe system, the protective range in progressive group quantization enables full register-level parallelism during INT4 to INT8 dequantization, using a subtraction after multiplication computation order. Furthermore, we propose compute-aware weight reordering to minimize pointer arithmetic overhead on CUDA cores during W4A8 GEMM operations. Additionally, we delay the turning point of the CUDA core roofline and decrease the computational intensity of KV4 attention at the same time. This ensures that the attention operator remains within the memory-bound region, where low-bit quantization can effectively enhance throughput.
items.zh: 在QServe系统中，渐进式分组量化中的保护范围使得在INT4到INT8反量化过程中，通过先乘后减的计算顺序，实现完全的寄存器级并行性。此外，我们提出了计算感知的权重重排序，以最小化W4A8 GEMM操作中CUDA核心上的指针算术开销。同时，我们延迟了CUDA核心屋顶线的转折点，并同时降低了KV4注意力的计算强度。这确保了注意力算子保持在内存受限区域，其中低位量化可以有效提高吞吐量。

items.en: We evaluate seven widely-used LLMs using QServe on A100 and L40S GPUs, and compare their maximum achievable throughput against state-of-the-art systems, including TensorRT-LLM (in FP16, W8A8, and W4A16 configurations), Atom [44] (in W4A4), and QuaRot [2] (in W4A4). On A100 GPUs, QServe achieves 1.2-2.4×\times higher throughput over the best-performing configuration of TensorRT-LLM, and 2.5-2.9×\times higher throughput compared to Atom and QuaRot. On L40S GPUs, QServe records an even more significant 1.5-3.5×\times throughput improvement over TensorRT-LLM. Notably, we manage to accommodate the same batch size on the L40S while consistently achieving higher serving throughput than TensorRT-LLM on A100 for six of the eight models tested, thereby significantly reducing LLM serving cost by 3×\times.
items.zh: 我们在A100和L40S GPU上使用QServe评估了七个广泛使用的LLM，并将其最大可达吞吐量与最先进的系统进行了比较，包括TensorRT-LLM（FP16、W8A8和W4A16配置）、Atom（W4A4）和QuaRot（W4A4）。在A100 GPU上，QServe的吞吐量比TensorRT-LLM的最佳配置高1.2-2.4倍，比Atom和QuaRot高2.5-2.9倍。在L40S GPU上，QServe的吞吐量比TensorRT-LLM高出1.5-3.5倍，提升更为显著。值得注意的是，我们在L40S上成功容纳了相同的批量大小，同时在测试的八个模型中有六个模型的服务吞吐量始终高于A100上的TensorRT-LLM，从而将LLM服务成本显著降低了3倍。

items.en: Large Language Models (LLMs) are a family of causal transformer models with multiple identically-structured layers. Each layer combines an attention block, a feed-forward network (FFN) and normalization layers. The input of each layer, 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x}, is an N×H​D𝑁𝐻𝐷N\times HD tensor, where N𝑁N is the number of input tokens, H𝐻H represents the number of attention heads, and D𝐷D is the hidden dimension for each head. Serving LLMs involves two stages: the prefilling stage, where all prompt tokens are presented simultaneously (N>1𝑁1N>1 for each request), and the decoding stage, where the model only processes one token at a time for each prompt (N=1𝑁1N=1 for each request).
items.zh: 大语言模型（LLM）是一类因果Transformer模型，具有多个结构相同的层。每一层包含一个注意力块、一个前馈网络（FFN）和归一化层。每层的输入𝐱是一个N×HD张量，其中N是输入token数，H是注意力头数，D是每个头的隐藏维度。LLM服务包括两个阶段：预填充阶段，其中所有提示token同时呈现（每个请求N>1）；解码阶段，其中模型每个请求每次只处理一个token（每个请求N=1）。

items.en: In this paper, we denote x𝑥x-bit weight, y𝑦y-bit activation and z𝑧z-bit KV cache quantization in LLMs as WxAyKVz, and use the abbreviated notation WxAy if y=z. Apart from bit precision, quantization can also be applied at various granularities. Per-tensor quantization shares s𝑠s and z𝑧z across the entire tensor. Per-channel quantization for weights or per-token quantization for activations means that s𝑠s and z𝑧z are shared within each row of tensor. Per-group quantization further reduces the degree of parameter sharing by using different s𝑠s and z𝑧z for every g𝑔g columns within each row, where g𝑔g is the group size.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们将LLM中的x位权重、y位激活和z位KV缓存量化表示为WxAyKVz，如果y=z，则使用缩写WxAy。除了位精度，量化还可以在不同粒度上应用。逐张量量化在整个张量上共享s和z。权重的逐通道量化或激活的逐token量化意味着s和z在张量的每一行内共享。逐组量化通过在同一行内每g列使用不同的s和z，进一步减少了参数共享程度，其中g是组大小。

items.en: Weight and KV cache quantization (e.g. W4, KV4) can reduce the memory footprint in LLM serving. Quantizing both weight and activation (e.g. W8A8) can also improve the peak computation throughput. Choosing the right precision for LLM deployment is a difficult task. Existing solutions can be divided into three categories: W4A16 (per-group), W8A8 (per-channel weight + per-token activation), W4A4 (per-group). We will demonstrate in this section why W4A8KV4 is a superior choice.
items.zh: 权重和KV缓存量化（例如W4、KV4）可以减少LLM服务中的内存占用。同时量化权重和激活（例如W8A8）也可以提高峰值计算吞吐量。为LLM部署选择正确的精度是一项困难的任务。现有解决方案可分为三类：W4A16（逐组）、W8A8（逐通道权重+逐token激活）、W4A4（逐组）。我们将在本节中展示为什么W4A8KV4是更优的选择。

full.sec: III-A W4A8KV4 Has Superior Roofline Over W8A8, W4A16

items.capEn: Figure 2: Left: Both attention and GEMM are crucial for end-to-end LLM latency. Right: Despite 2×\times higher theoretical peak performance, W4A4 systems significantly lag behind TRT-LLM-W8A8 in efficiency.
items.capZh: 图2：左：注意力和GEMM对于端到端LLM延迟都至关重要。右：尽管理论峰值性能高出2倍，W4A4系统的效率显著落后于TRT-LLM-W8A8。

items.capEn: Figure 3: A100 roofline for LLM serving: for GEMM layers, the W4A8 roofline dominates both W4A16 and W8A8 across different batch sizes; for attention layers, 4-bit quantization improves theoretical peak performance.
items.capZh: 图3：LLM服务的A100屋顶线：对于GEMM层，W4A8屋顶线在不同批量大小下均优于W4A16和W8A8；对于注意力层，4位量化提高了理论峰值性能。

items.en: We begin our exploration through roofline analysis. As in Figure 2a, when considering real-world conversations with 1024 input tokens and 512 output tokens, attention and GEMM account for most of the runtime when deploying LLMs. Furthermore, the runtime of the decoding stage is approximately 6×\times that of the prefilling stage. Therefore, we focus our analysis on the attention and GEMM within the decoding stage.
items.zh: 我们通过屋顶线分析开始探索。如图2a所示，在考虑1024个输入token和512个输出token的真实对话时，注意力和GEMM占据了部署LLM时的大部分运行时间。此外，解码阶段的运行时间大约是预填充阶段的6倍。因此，我们将分析重点放在解码阶段的注意力和GEMM上。

items.en: For an m×n×k𝑚𝑛𝑘m\times n\times k GEMM problem, the computation intensity (defined as MACs/element) is approximately m𝑚m when n,k𝑛𝑘n,k are much larger than m𝑚m. This situation applies to LLM decoding stage, since m𝑚m is number of sequences and n,k𝑛𝑘n,k are channel sizes. According to the A100 roofline111A100 has a peak FP16/INT8/INT4 tensor core performance of 312/624/1248 TOPS and a DRAM bandwidth of 2 TB/s. in Figure 3, W4A16 has a higher theoretical throughput when m<78𝑚78m<78, while W8A8 performs better when m>78𝑚78m>78. When the input batch size is small, GEMMs in LLMs are memory bound, and the memory bandwidth is dominated by weight traffic. Therefore, the smaller memory footprint of W4A16 leads to better performance. However, when m𝑚m is large, the problem is compute bound. Thus, W8A8 has faster speed thanks to the higher throughput from INT8 tensor cores. Intuitively, one can expect W4A8 to combine the best of both worlds across all batch sizes. This is clearly demonstrated in Figure 3, as long as we can perform all computation on INT8 tensor cores.
items.zh: 对于一个 m×n×k 的 GEMM 问题，当 n 和 k 远大于 m 时，计算强度（定义为 MACs/元素）约为 m。这种情况适用于 LLM 解码阶段，因为 m 是序列数，而 n 和 k 是通道大小。根据图 3 中的 A100 roofline¹，当 m<78 时，W4A16 具有更高的理论吞吐量，而当 m>78 时，W8A8 表现更好。当输入批次大小较小时，LLM 中的 GEMM 受内存限制，内存带宽主要由权重流量决定。因此，W4A16 较小的内存占用带来了更好的性能。然而，当 m 较大时，问题受算力限制。因此，W8A8 凭借 INT8 张量核心更高的吞吐量而速度更快。直观上，可以预期 W4A8 能在所有批次大小下结合两者的优势。图 3 清楚地展示了这一点，只要我们能将所有计算在 INT8 张量核心上执行。

items.en: Why KV4: attention workloads in LLM decoding can be formulated as a sequence of batched GEMV operations, with a computation intensity of 1 MAC / element regardless of input batch sizes. As in Equation 1, the memory traffic is dominated by KV cache access, since S≫N=1much-greater-than𝑆𝑁1S\gg N=1 for each sequence. Quantizing the KV cache can be viewed as effectively increasing the memory bandwidth. Therefore, KV4 offers 2×\times peak performance for attention over KV8. This improvement offers decent end-to-end speedup opportunities, since attention accounts for more than 50% of total runtime at batch=64 in Figure 2a.
items.zh: 为什么选择 KV4：LLM 解码中的注意力工作负载可以表述为一系列批处理 GEMV 操作，其计算强度为 1 MAC/元素，与输入批次大小无关。如公式 1 所示，内存流量主要由 KV 缓存访问决定，因为对于每个序列，S≫N=1。量化 KV 缓存可以视为有效增加内存带宽。因此，KV4 在注意力方面比 KV8 提供了 2 倍的峰值性能。这种改进提供了可观的端到端加速机会，因为在图 2a 中，当 batch=64 时，注意力占总运行时间的 50% 以上。

full.sec: III-B Why Not W4A4KV4: Main Loop Overhead in GEMM
full.secZh: 三-B 为何不选W4A4KV4：GEMM主循环开销

items.capEn: Figure 4: Illustration of m×n×k𝑚𝑛𝑘m\times n\times k GPU GEMM: m,n𝑚𝑛m,n are parallel dimensions and the reduction dimension k𝑘k has a sequential main loop. In LLM serving, m𝑚m is small and n,k𝑛𝑘n,k are large. Thus, the main loop is long.
items.capZh: 图 4：m×n×k GPU GEMM 示意图：m 和 n 是并行维度，归约维度 k 有一个顺序主循环。在 LLM 服务中，m 较小，而 n 和 k 较大。因此，主循环较长。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Quantized GEMM on GPUs: W8A8 is fast because its main loop only contains tensor core operations and all dequantization operations are present in the epilogue. Atom-W4A4 and TensorRT-LLM-W4A16 suffer from significant partial sum or weight dequantization overhead in the main loop. Thanks to the two-level progressive quantiation algorithm, QServe-W4A8 reduces main loop dequantization overhead by introducing register-level parallelism.
items.capZh: 图 5：GPU 上的量化 GEMM：W8A8 速度快，因为其主循环仅包含张量核心操作，所有反量化操作都在 epilogue 中。Atom-W4A4 和 TensorRT-LLM-W4A16 在主循环中遭受显著的偏置和或权重反量化开销。得益于两级渐进量化算法，QServe-W4A8 通过引入寄存器级并行性减少了主循环反量化开销。

items.en: A natural follow-up question would be: “Why do we not choose the even more aggressive W4A4?” W4A4 starts to achieve better theoretical GEMM performance when m𝑚m, the number of input sequences, exceeds 78, as 4-bit tensor cores are twice as performant compared to their 8-bit counterparts. However, apart from the significant accuracy degradation, which will be discussed in Section VI, we demonstrate that such theoretical performance gains cannot be realized on existing GPU architectures (Ampere and Hopper). As in Figure 2b, existing W4A4 serving systems Atom [44] and QuaRot [2] are even significantly slower than the W16A16 solution from TensorRT-LLM.
items.zh: 一个自然的后续问题是：“为什么我们不选择更激进的 W4A4？”当输入序列数 m 超过 78 时，W4A4 开始实现更好的理论 GEMM 性能，因为 4 位张量核心的性能是 8 位张量核心的两倍。然而，除了将在第六节讨论的显著精度下降外，我们证明这种理论性能增益无法在现有 GPU 架构（Ampere 和 Hopper）上实现。如图 2b 所示，现有的 W4A4 服务系统 Atom [44] 和 QuaRot [2] 甚至明显慢于 TensorRT-LLM 的 W16A16 方案。

items.en: While this performance gap can be partially explained by the inefficient runtime in these two systems, the inherent difficulty in mapping per-group quantized W4A4 GEMM on GPUs has been overlooked in previous literature. State-of-the-art systems implement tensor core GEMM with an output stationary dataflow shown in Figure 4. For an m×n×k𝑚𝑛𝑘m\times n\times k problem, each thread block computes a tm×tnsubscript𝑡𝑚subscript𝑡𝑛t_{m}\times t_{n} output tile by iterating sequentially through the reduction dimension k𝑘k. This sequential loop is referred to as the main loop. The main loop comprises more than 100 iterations and dominates the runtime of the GEMM kernel. In both FP16 and W8A8 GEMM (Figure 5a), the main loop is executed entirely on tensor cores. TensorRT-LLM-W4A16 (Figure 5b) and Atom-W4A4 (Figure 5c) both require dequantization operations in the main loop, which is running on the CUDA cores. W4A16 requires INT4 to FP16 weight conversion, while Atom-W4A4 requires INT32 to FP32 partial sum conversion and accumulation.
items.zh: 虽然这种性能差距可以部分归因于这两个系统中低效的运行时，但先前文献中忽略了在 GPU 上映射每组量化 W4A4 GEMM 的固有困难。最先进的系统实现了图 4 所示的输出固定数据流的张量核心 GEMM。对于一个 m×n×k 的问题，每个线程块通过顺序迭代归约维度 k 来计算一个 tm×tn 的输出瓦片。这个顺序循环被称为主循环。主循环包含超过 100 次迭代，并主导 GEMM 内核的运行时。在 FP16 和 W8A8 GEMM（图 5a）中，主循环完全在张量核心上执行。TensorRT-LLM-W4A16（图 5b）和 Atom-W4A4（图 5c）都需要在主循环中进行反量化操作，这些操作在 CUDA 核心上运行。W4A16 需要 INT4 到 FP16 的权重转换，而 Atom-W4A4 需要 INT32 到 FP32 的偏置和转换与累加。

items.en: The dequantization process in Atom’s main loop leads to two substantial efficiency bottlenecks. Firstly, on modern data center GPUs like the A100 and H100, the peak performance of FP32 CUDA cores is merely 2% of their INT4 tensor core counterparts. That said, de-quantizing one single partial sum in Atom is equivalent to 50 tensor core MACs. Therefore, the main loop is dominated by slow CUDA core operations rather than fast tensor core operations. Secondly, Atom creates two sets of registers (one for FP32 and one for INT32) to hold partial sums. Larger GEMM problems (e.g., prefilling stage) are typically register-bound on GPUs due to the nature of the output stationary dataflow, which results in high register consumption for storing partial sums. Consuming a large number of registers within each warp limits the number of warps that can be executed simultaneously on the streaming multiprocessor. It is important to note that GPUs rely on low-cost context switching between a large number of in-flight warps to hide latency. Consequently, a smaller number of concurrently executed warps limits the opportunity for latency hiding, further exacerbating the main loop overhead.
items.zh: Atom 主循环中的反量化过程导致了两个显著的效率瓶颈。首先，在像 A100 和 H100 这样的现代数据中心 GPU 上，FP32 CUDA 核心的峰值性能仅为 INT4 张量核心的 2%。也就是说，在 Atom 中反量化一个偏置和相当于 50 个张量核心 MAC。因此，主循环由慢速的 CUDA 核心操作主导，而不是快速的张量核心操作。其次，Atom 创建了两组寄存器（一组用于 FP32，一组用于 INT32）来保存偏置和。由于输出固定数据流的性质，较大的 GEMM 问题（例如，预填充阶段）通常在 GPU 上受寄存器限制，这导致存储偏置和时寄存器消耗高。在每个 warp 内消耗大量寄存器限制了流式多处理器上可同时执行的 warp 数量。值得注意的是，GPU 依赖于大量在途 warp 之间的低成本上下文切换来隐藏延迟。因此，并发执行的 warp 数量较少限制了延迟隐藏的机会，进一步加剧了主循环开销。

items.en: We preview our QServe’s W4A8 per-group quantized GEMM kernel design in Figure 5d. We employ a two-level progressive group quantization approach to ensure that all computations are performed on INT8 tensor cores. We opt for weight dequantization over partial sum dequantization due to its lower register pressure. Furthermore, we apply 4-way register-level parallelism to decode four INT4 weights simultaneously, further reducing the main loop overhead.
items.zh: 我们在图 5d 中预览了 QServe 的 W4A8 每组量化 GEMM 内核设计。我们采用了两级渐进组量化方法，以确保所有计算都在 INT8 张量核心上执行。我们选择权重反量化而非偏置和反量化，因为其寄存器压力更低。此外，我们应用了 4 路寄存器级并行性来同时解码四个 INT4 权重，进一步减少了主循环开销。

items.en: To this end, we have discussed why W4A8KV4 is a superior quantization precision choice. Yet, preserving model accuracy with such low-bit quantization remains a significant challenge. To unleash the full potential of W4A8KV4 without compromising the efficacy of large language models, we propose QoQ algorithm featuring progressive group quantization, SmoothAttention, and various general quantization optimizations.
items.zh: 至此，我们已经讨论了为什么 W4A8KV4 是一种优越的量化精度选择。然而，用如此低位量化保持模型精度仍然是一个重大挑战。为了在不损害大语言模型效能的情况下释放 W4A8KV4 的全部潜力，我们提出了 QoQ 算法，该算法具有渐进组量化、SmoothAttention 和各种通用量化优化。

full.secZh: 四-A 渐进式分组量化

items.capEn: Figure 6: Progressive Group Quantization first employs per-channel INT8 quantization with protective range [-119, 119], followed by per-group INT4 quantization, so that the dequantized intermediate values remain within the INT8 range for computation. Bottom: prior methods directly applies per-group INT4 quantization on weights, followed by per-channel INT8 quantization on scale factors. Thus the dequantized intermediate values may exceed the INT8 range, necessitating further dequantization to floating-point values for computation.
items.capZh: 图 6：渐进组量化首先采用具有保护范围 [-119, 119] 的每通道 INT8 量化，然后进行每组 INT4 量化，使得反量化后的中间值保持在 INT8 范围内以供计算。底部：先前方法直接对权重应用每组 INT4 量化，然后对缩放因子进行每通道 INT8 量化。因此，反量化后的中间值可能超出 INT8 范围，需要进一步反量化为浮点值进行计算。

items.en: To enhance the accuracy of low-bit quantization, group quantization is commonly utilized [44, 23, 12]. However, as outlined in Section 5, the dequantization overhead in the system implementation can negate these accuracy improvements. To tackle this issue, we introduce progressive group quantization, as depicted in Figure 6.
items.zh: 为了提高低位量化的精度，通常使用组量化 [44, 23, 12]。然而，如第 5 节所述，系统实现中的反量化开销可能会抵消这些精度改进。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了渐进组量化，如图 6 所示。

items.en: Given the weight tensor 𝐖∈ℝk×n𝐖superscriptℝ𝑘𝑛\mathbf{W}\in\mathbb{R}^{k\times n}, we first apply per-channel symmetric INT8 quantization:
items.zh: 给定权重张量 W ∈ ℝ^{k×n}，我们首先应用每通道对称 INT8 量化：

We then further employ per-group asymmetric INT4 quantization on the intermediate weight tensor:
items.zh: 其中 Q_W_s8^(0) ∈ ℕ^{n×k} 是中间 8 位量化权重张量，s_fp16^(0) ∈ ℝ^{n×1} 是通道级量化缩放因子。然后我们进一步对中间权重张量应用每组非对称 INT4 量化：

items.en: where 𝐐𝐖u4∈ℕn×ksubscriptsubscript𝐐𝐖u4superscriptℕ𝑛𝑘{\mathbf{Q}_{\mathbf{W}}}_{\mathrm{u4}}\in\mathbb{N}^{n\times k} is the unsigned 4-bit quantized weight tensor, 𝐳u4∈ℕn×k/gsubscript𝐳u4superscriptℕ𝑛𝑘𝑔\mathbf{z}_{\mathrm{u4}}\in\mathbb{N}^{n\times k/g} is the unsigned 4-bit group-wise quantization zero points, and 𝐬u8(1)∈ℕn×k/gsubscriptsuperscript𝐬1u8superscriptℕ𝑛𝑘𝑔\mathbf{s}^{(1)}_{\mathrm{u8}}\in\mathbb{N}^{n\times k/g} is the unsigned 8-bit group-wise quantization scales.
items.zh: 其中 Q_W_u4 ∈ ℕ^{n×k} 是无符号 4 位量化权重张量，z_u4 ∈ ℕ^{n×k/g} 是无符号 4 位组级量化零点，s_u8^(1) ∈ ℕ^{n×k/g} 是无符号 8 位组级量化缩放因子。

items.en: For W4A8 GEMM computation, the 4-bit quantized weight tensor 𝐐𝐖u4subscriptsubscript𝐐𝐖u4{\mathbf{Q}_{\mathbf{W}}}_{\mathrm{u4}} will be first dequantized into intermediate 8-bit quantized weight tensor 𝐐𝐖s8(0)superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝐐𝐖s80{\mathbf{Q}_{\mathbf{W}}}_{\mathrm{s8}}^{(0)} following Equation 5, and then perform INT8 matrix multiplication as if it was W8A8 per-channel quantization.
items.zh: 对于 W4A8 GEMM 计算，4 位量化权重张量 Q_W_u4 将首先按照公式 5 反量化为中间 8 位量化权重张量 Q_W_s8^(0)，然后像 W8A8 每通道量化一样执行 INT8 矩阵乘法。

items.en: naïvely applying Equation 4 and 5 does not guarantee that the intermediate dequantized weights perfectly lie in the 8-bit integer representation range. For example, after INT8 quantization, a group of 8-bit weights lie in [−113,120]113120[-113,120]. 4-bit asymmetric quantization will yield a scale factor of ⌈(120−−113)/(15−0)⌋=16\lceil(120--113)/(15-0)\rfloor=16 and a zero point of ⌈0−−113/16⌋=7\lceil 0--113/16\rfloor=7. Thus value 120 is quantized into ⌈120/16+7⌋=15\lceil 120/16+7\rfloor=15. It will be dequantized into (15−7)∗16=12815716128(15-7)*16=128 which is beyond the max 8-bit integer 127. One straightforward solution is to turn on the saturation option in the arithmetic instructions during dequantization. However, simply applying saturation will severely damage the computation throughput, reducing speed by as much as 67%.
items.zh: 简单地应用公式 4 和 5 并不能保证中间反量化权重完全落在 8 位整数表示范围内。例如，在 INT8 量化后，一组 8 位权重位于 [-113,120] 范围内。4 位非对称量化将产生缩放因子 ⌈(120-(-113))/(15-0)⌋ = 16 和零点 ⌈0-(-113)/16⌋ = 7。因此，值 120 被量化为 ⌈120/16+7⌋ = 15。它将被反量化为 (15-7)*16 = 128，这超出了最大 8 位整数 127。一个直接的解决方案是在反量化期间开启算术指令中的饱和选项。然而，简单地应用饱和会严重损害计算吞吐量，速度降低高达 67%。

items.en: We reconsider the dequantization process. Take Equation 2 into Equation 5, we have,
items.zh: 我们重新考虑反量化过程。将公式 2 代入公式 5，我们得到：

items.en: Since su​8=qs​8max−qs​8minqu​4max−qu​4min≤127−(−128)15−0=17subscript𝑠𝑢8subscriptsubscript𝑞𝑠8subscriptsubscript𝑞𝑠8subscriptsubscript𝑞𝑢4subscriptsubscript𝑞𝑢412712815017{s}_{u8}=\frac{{{q}_{s8}}_{\max}-{{q}_{s8}}_{\min}}{{{q}_{u4}}_{\max}-{{q}_{u4}}_{\min}}\leq\frac{127-(-128)}{15-0}=17, we have,
Therefore, we shrink the INT8 symmetric quantization range from [-127, 127] to a protective range [-119, 119] in order to avoid the dequantization overflow, as shown in the top of Figure 6.
items.zh: 因此，我们将 INT8 对称量化范围从 [-127, 127] 缩小到保护范围 [-119, 119]，以避免反量化溢出，如图 6 顶部所示。

items.en: progressive group quantization introduces two levels of scales 𝐬fp16(0)subscriptsuperscript𝐬0fp16\mathbf{s}^{(0)}_{\mathrm{fp16}} and 𝐬u8(1)subscriptsuperscript𝐬1u8\mathbf{s}^{(1)}_{\mathrm{u8}}. Prior studies such as VSQuant and DoubleQuant in QLoRA [9] also introduce two levels of scales to reduce the memory footprint of group-wise scaling factors. In contrast to our quantization flow, previous approaches directly apply group quantization with the target precision and then perform per-channel quantization on the group-wise floating-point scaling factors, as shown in the bottom of Figure 6:
items.zh: 渐进组量化引入了两级缩放因子 s_fp16^(0) 和 s_u8^(1)。先前的研究，如 VSQuant 和 QLoRA [9] 中的 DoubleQuant，也引入了两级缩放因子以减少组级缩放因子的内存占用。与我们的量化流程相比，先前方法直接以目标精度应用组量化，然后对组级浮点缩放因子进行每通道量化，如图 6 底部所示：

items.en: Therefore, using the group-wise scaling factors 𝐬u8(1)subscriptsuperscript𝐬1u8{\mathbf{s}}^{(1)}_{\mathrm{u8}} to dequantize 𝐐𝐖s4subscript𝐐subscript𝐖s4\mathbf{Q}_{\mathbf{W}_{\mathrm{s4}}} cannot yield the 8-bit weight tensor. During the computation on GPUs, these approaches usually first dequantize the scales and, subsequently, the weights into floating-point values, which ultimately limits the peak throughput.
items.zh: 因此，使用组级缩放因子 𝐬u8(1) 对 𝐐𝐖s4 进行反量化无法得到8位权重张量。在GPU计算过程中，这些方法通常先将缩放因子和权重反量化为浮点值，这最终限制了峰值吞吐量。

items.en: DGQ [43] also follows the quantization scheme of VSQuant and DoubleQuant, but enforces restrictions on scaling factors to make sure that all computation can be mapped onto INT8 tensor cores. However, the DGQ serving system separates dequantization kernel with the GEMM kernel. Consequently, the end-to-end latency of W4A8 GEMM in DGQ is even slower than the W8A8 GEMM in cuBLAS, failing to demonstrate the memory bandwidth advantage of 4-bit weight quantization. In contrast, our QoQ introduces a protective range, allowing us to fuse dequantization operations into the W4A8 GEMM kernel with full register-level parallelism, minimizing CUDA core overhead. Thus, our QServe’s W4A8 per-group GEMM achieves 1.5×\times speedup over the W8A8 cuBLAS GEMM.
items.zh: DGQ [43] 也遵循VSQuant和DoubleQuant的量化方案，但对缩放因子施加了限制，以确保所有计算都能映射到INT8张量核心上。然而，DGQ服务系统将反量化内核与GEMM内核分离。因此，DGQ中W4A8 GEMM的端到端延迟甚至比cuBLAS中的W8A8 GEMM还要慢，未能体现4位权重量化的内存带宽优势。相比之下，我们的QoQ引入了保护范围，使得我们能够将反量化操作融合到W4A8 GEMM内核中，实现完全的寄存器级并行，从而最小化CUDA核心开销。因此，我们的QServe的W4A8每组GEMM比W8A8 cuBLAS GEMM实现了1.5倍的加速。

items.capEn: Figure 7: SmoothAttention effectively smooths the outliers in Keys. Values doesn’t suffer from outliers.
items.capZh: 图7：SmoothAttention有效平滑了Keys中的异常值。Values不受异常值影响。

items.en: As illustrated in Figure 16, directly reducing the KV cache to 4 bits significantly degrades the LLM accuracy. We visualize the magnitude distributions of the sampled Key and Value cache activations in Figure 7. We observe that: the Value matrices show no significant outlier pattern, whereas Key matrices tend to have fixed outlier channels in each head. These outliers are ∼similar-to\sim10×\times larger than most of activation values. Though they can be easily handled KV8 quantization in prior works [38], it places challenging obstacle to KV4 quantization due to less quantization levels.
items.zh: 如图16所示，直接将KV缓存降至4位会显著降低LLM的精度。我们在图7中可视化了采样到的Key和Value缓存激活值的幅度分布。我们观察到：Value矩阵没有明显的异常值模式，而Key矩阵在每个头中往往有固定的异常值通道。这些异常值比大多数激活值大约10倍。虽然先前的工作[38]可以通过KV8量化轻松处理它们，但由于量化级别较少，KV4量化面临严峻挑战。

items.en: Inspired by SmoothQuant [38], we propose SmoothAttention to scale down the outlier channels in Key cache by a per-channel factor λ𝜆\mathbf{\lambda}:
items.zh: 受SmoothQuant [38]启发，我们提出SmoothAttention，通过逐通道因子 λ 来缩小Key缓存中的异常值通道：

items.en: SmoothQuant migrates the quantization difficulty from activations to weights, and thus requires a dedicate balance between activation and weight quantization by searching the migration strength. In contrast, since we do not quantize Queries, we only need to concentrate on the Keys and simply choose the SmoothAttention scale factor as,
items.zh: SmoothQuant将量化难度从激活值迁移到权重，因此需要通过搜索迁移强度来仔细平衡激活值和权重的量化。相比之下，由于我们不量化Queries，我们只需关注Keys，并简单选择SmoothAttention缩放因子为：

items.en: In practice, α=0.5𝛼0.5\alpha=0.5 is good enough. As shown in Figure 7, after SmoothAttention, the outliers in Key cache have been greatly smoothed.
items.zh: 在实践中，α=0.5 就足够了。如图7所示，经过SmoothAttention后，Key缓存中的异常值得到了极大平滑。

items.en: In order to eliminate the extra kernel call overhead for SmoothAttention scaling, fusing the scale into preceding linear layer’s weights is preferred. However, modern LLMs employ the rotary positional embedding (RoPE) to both Keys and Queries, which needs extra handling. In practice, rotary positional embedding pairs channel i𝑖i with channel i+D2𝑖𝐷2i+\frac{D}{2} within each head. Consequently, to make SmoothAttention scaling commutative in terms of RoPE, we add a hard constraint that λi=λi+D2subscript𝜆𝑖subscript𝜆𝑖𝐷2\lambda_{i}=\lambda_{i+\frac{D}{2}}, and accordingly,
items.zh: 为了消除SmoothAttention缩放带来的额外内核调用开销，最好将缩放因子融合到前一个线性层的权重中。然而，现代LLM对Keys和Queries都使用旋转位置编码（RoPE），这需要额外处理。在实践中，旋转位置编码在每个头内将通道 i 与通道 i+D/2 配对。因此，为了使SmoothAttention缩放相对于RoPE可交换，我们施加一个硬约束：λ_i = λ_{i+D/2}，相应地，

items.en: Afterwards, we can easily fuse the SmoothAttention scale 𝚲𝚲\mathbf{\Lambda} into previous layers’ weights following 𝐖Q=𝚲​𝐖Qsubscript𝐖𝑄𝚲subscript𝐖𝑄\mathbf{W}_{Q}=\mathbf{\Lambda}\mathbf{W}_{Q} and 𝐖K=𝚲−1​𝐖Ksubscript𝐖𝐾superscript𝚲1subscript𝐖𝐾\mathbf{W}_{K}=\mathbf{\Lambda}^{-1}\mathbf{W}_{K}.
items.zh: 之后，我们可以轻松地将SmoothAttention缩放因子 𝚲 融合到前一层权重中，遵循 𝐖_Q = 𝚲𝐖_Q 和 𝐖_K = 𝚲^{-1}𝐖_K。

items.en: One of the key challenges of low-bit LLM quantization is the activation outliers for every linear layers. We apply different optimizations for different types of linear layers as discussed below.
items.zh: 低位LLM量化的关键挑战之一是每个线性层的激活值异常值。我们对不同类型的线性层应用不同的优化，如下所述。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Rotate the block input activations to suppress the outliers: since rotation is a unitary transformation, the rotation matrix 𝐐𝐐\mathbf{Q} can be absorbed by the weights of the output module in the previous block.
items.capZh: 图8：旋转块输入激活值以抑制异常值：由于旋转是酉变换，旋转矩阵 𝐐 可以被前一块的输出模块的权重吸收。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Smooth the block intermediate activations, migrating the quantization difficulty to weights: since smoothing is channel-independent, the smooth matrix 𝚲𝚲\mathbf{\Lambda} is diagonal and can be absorbed by the weights of the previous modules.
items.capZh: 图9：平滑块中间激活值，将量化难度迁移到权重：由于平滑是通道独立的，平滑矩阵 𝚲 是对角矩阵，可以被前一个模块的权重吸收。

items.en: In transformer blocks, we define the components that take in the block inputs as input modules, such as the QKV Projection Layer and the FFN 1st Layer. As shown in Figure 9, inspired by [2, 4], we rotate the block input activations by multiplying the rotation matrix. To keep mathematical equivalence of linear layers, we rotate the corresponding weights accordingly in the reversed direction. After rotation, each channel’s activations are linear combinations of all other channels, and thus outlier channels are effectively suppressed. Furthermore, since rotation is a unitary transformation, we can fuse the rotation matrix with the previous linear layers’ weights. We simply choose the scaled Hadamard matrix as the rotation matrix.
items.zh: 在Transformer块中，我们将接收块输入的组件定义为输入模块，例如QKV投影层和FFN第一层。如图9所示，受[2, 4]启发，我们通过乘以旋转矩阵来旋转块输入激活值。为了保持线性层的数学等价性，我们相应地反向旋转对应的权重。旋转后，每个通道的激活值是所有其他通道的线性组合，因此异常值通道被有效抑制。此外，由于旋转是酉变换，我们可以将旋转矩阵与前一个线性层的权重融合。我们简单选择缩放后的Hadamard矩阵作为旋转矩阵。

items.en: Output modules refer to those layers that generate block outputs, such as the Output Projection Layer and FFN 2nd Layer. As shown in Figure 9, inspired by [38], we smooth the block intermediate activations through dividing them by a per-channel smoothing factor. Original SmoothQuant does not smooth the block intermediate activations; moreover, if we directly smooth these modules with the same migration strength as input modules (e.g., q_proj, up_proj), the evaluated Wikitext-2 perplexity of the Llama-2-7B model will drop by as much as 0.05. In practice, we find that the migration strength α𝛼\alpha should be near 0. That is, the smoothing factor λ𝜆\lambda is mostly determined by weights instead of activations, which is very different from the observations in SmoothQuant.
items.zh: 输出模块是指生成块输出的层，例如输出投影层和FFN第二层。如图9所示，受[38]启发，我们通过除以逐通道平滑因子来平滑块中间激活值。原始的SmoothQuant不平滑块中间激活值；此外，如果我们直接以与输入模块（例如q_proj, up_proj）相同的迁移强度平滑这些模块，Llama-2-7B模型在Wikitext-2上的困惑度会下降多达0.05。在实践中，我们发现迁移强度 α 应接近0。也就是说，平滑因子 λ 主要由权重而非激活值决定，这与SmoothQuant中的观察结果非常不同。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Reorder weight input channels based on their salience in group quantization. Channel salience can be determined by the magnitude of input activations.
items.capZh: 图10：根据组量化中的显著性对权重输入通道进行重排序。通道显著性可以通过输入激活值的幅度来确定。

items.en: Both AWQ [23] and Atom [44] have observed that maintaining the salient weights in FP16 can significantly improve model accuracy. These salient weights can be identified by the activation distribution. Instead of introducing mixed-precision quantization used by Atom, we propose activation-aware channel reordering as shown in Figure 10. We use max⁡(|𝐗|)𝐗\max\left(|\mathbf{X}|\right) to determine the channel salience, and then reorder channels so that channels with similar salience are in the same quantization group.
items.zh: AWQ [23] 和 Atom [44] 都观察到将显著权重保留在FP16可以显著提高模型精度。这些显著权重可以通过激活值分布来识别。我们不采用Atom使用的混合精度量化，而是提出激活感知的通道重排序，如图10所示。我们使用 max(|𝐗|) 来确定通道显著性，然后重排序通道，使得具有相似显著性的通道位于同一量化组中。

items.en: Weight clipping is another popular quantization optimization technique. It applies a clip ratio α𝛼\alpha to the dynamic range in Equation 2 by letting 𝐖max=α​max⁡(𝐖)subscript𝐖𝛼𝐖\mathbf{W}_{\max}=\alpha\max\left(\mathbf{W}\right) and 𝐖min=α​min⁡(𝐖)subscript𝐖𝛼𝐖\mathbf{W}_{\min}=\alpha\min\left(\mathbf{W}\right). Previous approaches [12, 44, 2, 23] grid search the clip ratio α𝛼\alpha to minimize either quantization error of tensor itself (i.e., ‖𝐖−Q​(𝐖;α)‖norm𝐖𝑄𝐖𝛼\|\mathbf{W}-Q\left(\mathbf{W};\alpha\right)\|) or output mean square error (i.e., ‖𝐗𝐖T−𝐗​Q​(𝐖T;α)‖normsuperscript𝐗𝐖𝑇𝐗𝑄superscript𝐖𝑇𝛼\|\mathbf{X}\mathbf{W}^{T}-\mathbf{X}Q\left(\mathbf{W}^{T};\alpha\right)\|. In QServe, we minimize the layer output error for all linear layers, expect for q_proj and k_proj, for which we optimize block output mean square error:
items.zh: 权重裁剪是另一种流行的量化优化技术。它对公式2中的动态范围应用裁剪比例 α，令 𝐖_max = α max(𝐖) 和 𝐖_min = α min(𝐖)。先前的方法[12, 44, 2, 23]通过网格搜索裁剪比例 α，以最小化张量本身的量化误差（即 ‖𝐖 - Q(𝐖; α)‖）或输出均方误差（即 ‖𝐗𝐖^T - 𝐗 Q(𝐖^T; α)‖）。在QServe中，我们最小化所有线性层的层输出误差，但q_proj和k_proj除外，对于它们，我们优化块输出均方误差：

items.en: To this end, we have presented the QoQ quantization algorithm, which aims to minimize accuracy loss incurred by W4A8KV4 quantization. However, realizing the theoretical throughput benefits in Figure 3 remains challenging. Thus, in this section, we will delve into the QServe system design, which is guided by two important principles: I. Reducing main loop overhead in GEMM kernels; II. Making fused attention kernels memory bound.
items.zh: 至此，我们介绍了QoQ量化算法，旨在最小化W4A8KV4量化带来的精度损失。然而，实现图3中的理论吞吐量优势仍然具有挑战性。因此，在本节中，我们将深入探讨QServe系统设计，其遵循两个重要原则：I. 减少GEMM内核中的主循环开销；II. 使融合注意力内核受限于内存。

items.capEn: Figure 11: QServe’s precision mapping for an FP16 in, FP16 out LLM block. All GEMM operators take in W4A8 inputs and produce FP16 outputs. Activation quantization happens in normalization and activation layers.
items.capZh: 图11：QServe的FP16输入、FP16输出LLM块的精度映射。所有GEMM算子接受W4A8输入，产生FP16输出。激活量化发生在归一化和激活层。

items.en: We start by introducing the QServe runtime in Figure 11. All GEMM layers in QServe operate on W4A8 inputs, perform computation on INT8 tensor cores, and generate FP16 outputs. All attention layers perform computation in FP16 on CUDA cores. Consequently, each LLM block in QServe has FP16 inputs and FP16 outputs.
items.zh: 我们首先介绍图11中的QServe运行时。QServe中的所有GEMM层在W4A8输入上操作，在INT8张量核心上执行计算，并生成FP16输出。所有注意力层在CUDA核心上以FP16执行计算。因此，QServe中的每个LLM块具有FP16输入和FP16输出。

items.en: Activation Quantization. To ensure that each GEMM takes in INT8 activation, we fuse activation quantization into the preceding layernorm for the QKV projection and the first FFN layer, or into the preceding activation kernel for the second FFN layer. Furthermore, a separate quantization node is inserted before output projection in the attention block.
items.zh: 激活量化。为确保每个GEMM接收INT8激活，我们将激活量化融合到QKV投影和第一个FFN层的前置层归一化中，或融合到第二个FFN层的前置激活核中。此外，在注意力块的输出投影之前插入一个单独的量化节点。

items.en: KV Cache Management. To avoid memory fragmentation, we follow vLLM [21] and TensorRT-LLM [25] to adopt paged KV caches. In contrast to these two frameworks, which perform per-tensor, static quantization (i.e., scaling factors computed offline) on KV caches, QServe requires per-head, dynamic KV quantization to maintain competitive accuracy due to the lower bit precision (4 vs. 8). We therefore store FP16 scaling factors and zero points for each head immediately following the quantized KV features in each KV cache page, allowing these values to be updated on-the-fly. QServe also supports in-flight batching, similar to vLLM and TensorRT-LLM.
items.zh: KV缓存管理。为避免内存碎片，我们遵循vLLM [21]和TensorRT-LLM [25]采用分页KV缓存。与这两个框架对KV缓存执行逐张量静态量化（即离线计算缩放因子）不同，QServe需要逐头动态KV量化以保持竞争性精度（由于位宽更低：4位 vs 8位）。因此，我们在每个KV缓存页中紧接量化KV特征存储每个头的FP16缩放因子和零点，以便这些值可以动态更新。QServe还支持动态批处理，类似于vLLM和TensorRT-LLM。

items.en: As discussed in Section III, the main loop overhead poses a significant obstacle in allowing quantized GEMMs to attain the theoretical performance gains projected by the roofline model (Figure 3). Therefore, the focus of QServe W4A8 GEMM is to reduce main loop overhead. Specifically, we address the costs of pointer arithmetic operations through compute-aware weight reorder, and reduce dequantization overhead through a subtraction after multiplication computation order and register-level parallelism.
items.zh: 如第三节所述，主循环开销是阻碍量化GEMM达到屋顶线模型（图3）所预测的理论性能增益的主要障碍。因此，QServe W4A8 GEMM的重点是减少主循环开销。具体来说，我们通过计算感知权重重排序解决指针算术操作的成本，并通过乘法后减法计算顺序和寄存器级并行性减少反量化开销。

items.capEn: Figure 12: QServe applies compute-aware weight reoder to minimize the pointer arithmetics in W4A8 GEMM main loop.
items.capZh: 图12：QServe应用计算感知权重重排序以最小化W4A8 GEMM主循环中的指针算术操作。

items.en: Prior to dequantization and tensor core computation, the operands must be loaded from global memory into the L1 shared memory during each main loop iteration. This loading process is non-trivial since the tensor core GEMM intrisics require a strided layout for each thread in computation, as demonstrated in Figure 12a. For instance, instead of loading consecutive eight INT8 weights, thread 0 first loads input channels 0-3, then skips ahead to input channels 16-19. That said, a naive weight loading implementation would require one address calculation per four channels, leading to two efficiency issues. First, pointer arithmetic operations are performed on CUDA cores, which have 32×\times lower throughput than the INT8 tensor core on the A100. Consequently, the address calculation overhead becomes non-negligible. Second, strided memory access prevents achieving the highest HBM bandwidth through packed 128-bit loading, further slowing down the memory pipeline. This issue is addressed by the ldmatrix instruction when the storage and compute data types are the same. As illustrated in Figure 12a, thread i𝑖i loads a consecutive 128 bits in output channel i%​8percent𝑖8i\%8, and the ldmatrix instruction automatically distributes the data in a strided manner, ensuring that each thread eventually obtains the required data for INT8 tensor core computation.
items.zh: 在反量化和张量核心计算之前，每次主循环迭代中必须将操作数从全局内存加载到L1共享内存。此加载过程并非易事，因为张量核心GEMM内建函数要求每个线程在计算中采用跨步布局，如图12a所示。例如，线程0不是连续加载8个INT8权重，而是先加载输入通道0-3，然后跳过到输入通道16-19。也就是说，朴素的权重加载实现需要每四个通道进行一次地址计算，导致两个效率问题。首先，指针算术操作在CUDA核心上执行，其吞吐量比A100上的INT8张量核心低32倍。因此，地址计算开销变得不可忽略。其次，跨步内存访问阻止了通过打包的128位加载实现最高HBM带宽，进一步减慢了内存流水线。当存储和计算数据类型相同时，ldmatrix指令解决了这个问题。如图12a所示，线程i在输出通道i%8中加载连续的128位，ldmatrix指令自动以跨步方式分发数据，确保每个线程最终获得INT8张量核心计算所需的数据。

items.en: Unfortunately, the ldmatrix instruction will not work when the data types used for storage and computation differ (like in W4A8). Specifically, in Figure 12b, ldmatrix ensures that each thread obtains the same number of bytes, not the same number of elements, after data permutation in the register file. Consequently, thread 0 obtains the tiles needed by both itself and thread 1, while thread 1 obtains the tiles needed by thread 2 and thread 3 in the subsequent INT8 tensor core computation. This creates a mismatch between the data obtained by each thread and used in computation. That said, ldmatrix cannot be used for W4A8 GEMM and the aforementioned pointer arithmetic overhead persists. Worse still, memory bandwidth utilization deteriorates further as we consecutively load only 16 bits for 4-bit weights.
items.zh: 不幸的是，当存储和计算数据类型不同时（如W4A8），ldmatrix指令将无法工作。具体来说，在图12b中，ldmatrix确保每个线程在寄存器文件中的数据置换后获得相同数量的字节，而不是相同数量的元素。因此，线程0获得自身和线程1所需的瓦片，而线程1获得后续INT8张量核心计算中线程2和线程3所需的瓦片。这造成了每个线程获得的数据与计算中使用的数据之间的不匹配。也就是说，ldmatrix不能用于W4A8 GEMM，前述的指针算术开销仍然存在。更糟糕的是，由于我们连续加载仅16位的4位权重，内存带宽利用率进一步恶化。

items.en: We address this challenge through compute-aware weight reordering (Figure 12c). The key insight is to store the weights in the order they are used during computation. We divide the entire GEMM problem into multiple 32×\times32 tiles. Within each tile, thread 0 utilizes input channels 0-3 and 16-19 for output channels 0, 8, 16, and 24 (output channels 16-31 are omitted in Figure 12c). Consequently, we concatenate these 32 channels into a single 128-bit word. The 32 channels used by thread 1 are stored immediately following thread 0’s 32 channels. Since weights are static, such reordering does not introduce any runtime overhead. Additionally, it not only reduces the pointer arithmetic overhead to the same level as ldmatrix but also guarantees high-bandwidth 128-bit/thread memory transactions. We apply this reordering to zero points and scales as well to mitigate dequantization overhead.
items.zh: 我们通过计算感知权重重排序（图12c）解决这一挑战。关键见解是将权重按照计算中使用的顺序存储。我们将整个GEMM问题划分为多个32×32瓦片。在每个瓦片内，线程0使用输入通道0-3和16-19用于输出通道0、8、16和24（图12c中省略了输出通道16-31）。因此，我们将这32个通道连接成一个128位字。线程1使用的32个通道紧接在线程0的32个通道之后存储。由于权重是静态的，这种重排序不会引入任何运行时开销。此外，它不仅将指针算术开销降低到与ldmatrix相同的水平，还保证了高带宽的128位/线程内存事务。我们将此重排序也应用于零点和缩放因子，以减轻反量化开销。

items.capEn: Figure 13: QServe exploits register-level parallelism to significantly reduce the number of required logical operations in UINT4 to UINT8 weight unpacking.
items.capZh: 图13：QServe利用寄存器级并行性显著减少UINT4到UINT8权重解包所需的逻辑操作数量。

items.en: As illustrated in Figure 5d, dequantizing weights within the main loop becomes necessary when the bit precisions for weights and activations differ. In the case of per-channel W4A8 quantization, second-level scaling factors are omitted, and first-level FP16 scaling is efficiently fused into the GEMM epilogue. We therefore focus our discussion on the efficient conversion from ZINT4 (i.e., unsigned 4-bit integers with zero points) to SINT8 within the main loop. We further decompose this conversion into two steps: UINT4 to UINT8 (weight unpacking) and UINT8 to SINT8 (zero point subtraction). As depicted in Figure 13, we reorder every 32 UINT4 weights w0,w1,…,w31subscript𝑤0subscript𝑤1…subscript𝑤31w_{0},w_{1},...,w_{31} into w0,w16,w1,w17,…subscript𝑤0subscript𝑤16subscript𝑤1subscript𝑤17…w_{0},w_{16},w_{1},w_{17},... This allows us to exploit register-level parallelism and efficiently unpack them into UINT8 numbers with only three logical operations.
items.zh: 如图5d所示，当权重和激活的位精度不同时，在主循环内反量化权重变得必要。在逐通道W4A8量化的情况下，省略了第二级缩放因子，第一级FP16缩放被高效融合到GEMM后记中。因此，我们重点讨论在主循环内从ZINT4（即带零点的无符号4位整数）高效转换为SINT8。我们进一步将此转换分解为两步：UINT4到UINT8（权重解包）和UINT8到SINT8（零点减法）。如图13所示，我们将每32个UINT4权重w0,w1,...,w31重新排序为w0,w16,w1,w17,...。这使我们能够利用寄存器级并行性，仅用三个逻辑操作就高效地将它们解包为UINT8数字。

items.en: For the conversion from UINT8 to SINT8, the most intuitive approach is to introduce integer subtraction instructions within the main loop, which we refer to as subtraction before multiplication. Although straightforward, this approach inevitably introduces additional cost to the main loop, which is undesirable. Instead, we adopt a subtraction after multiplication approach to minimize the main loop overhead.
items.zh: 对于从UINT8到SINT8的转换，最直观的方法是在主循环内引入整数减法指令，我们称之为乘法前减法。虽然直接，但这种方法不可避免地给主循环带来额外成本，这是不可取的。相反，我们采用乘法后减法方法来最小化主循环开销。

We observe that Equation 13 has a form similar to the outer product of scaling factors. Therefore, it can also be fused into the epilogue of the W4A8 GEMM, analogous to the first term in Equation 12. To this end, we move the zero-point subtraction from the main loop to the epilogue, thereby largely eliminating its overhead in the GEMM kernel. This formulation of subtraction after multiplication necessitates precomputing 𝐭𝐗subscript𝐭𝐗\mathbf{t}_{\mathbf{X}}. Fortunately, each W4A8 kernel is always preceded by a memory-bound kernel, allowing us to fuse the precomputation kernel into it with negligible latency overhead.
items.zh: 其中𝐭𝐗=𝐗𝟏k，即对每个词元的所有输入通道求和。我们观察到方程13具有类似于缩放因子外积的形式。因此，它也可以融合到W4A8 GEMM的后记中，类似于方程12中的第一项。为此，我们将零点减法从主循环移到后记，从而在很大程度上消除了其在GEMM核中的开销。这种乘法后减法的公式需要预先计算𝐭𝐗。幸运的是，每个W4A8核之前总有一个内存密集型核，使我们能够将预计算核融合到其中，延迟开销可忽略不计。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Our progressive quantization algorithm ensures that all intermediate results in the subtraction after multiplication computation order will not overflow, thereby enabling register-level parallelism and reducing main loop overhead.
items.capZh: 图14：我们的渐进量化算法确保乘法后减法计算顺序中的所有中间结果不会溢出，从而实现寄存器级并行性并减少主循环开销。

items.en: The primary distinction between the per-group W4A8 GEMM and its per-channel counterpart lies in the second-level dequantization process in Figure 5d. Firstly, since zero points are now defined on a per-group basis, it is no longer possible to merge zero point subtraction into the epilogue, as was done in the previous section. Secondly, due to the presence of level 2 scales, an additional INT8 multiplication is required for each weight. Akin to the previous section, we must determine whether to apply multiplication (scales) or subtraction (zeros) first during level 2 dequantization.
items.zh: 逐组W4A8 GEMM与其逐通道版本的主要区别在于图5d中的第二级反量化过程。首先，由于零点现在是逐组定义的，无法再将零点减法合并到后记中，如前一节所做。其次，由于存在第二级缩放，每个权重需要额外的INT8乘法。类似于前一节，我们必须确定在第二级反量化中是先应用乘法（缩放）还是减法（零点）。

items.en: In this context, we contend that performing subtraction after multiplication remains the advantageous approach because it enables register-level parallelism (RLP). As shown in Figure 14, NVIDIA GPUs provide the vadd4 instruction that performs four INT8 additions with a single INT32 ALU operation. However, there is no instruction that realizes similar effect for 4-way INT8 multiplication. Consequently, in order to achieve RLP, one has to simulate this by padding 24 zeros to the most significant bits (MSBs) of the 8-bit scaling factor. However, this simulation is valid only when the result of each INT8 multiplication remains within the INT8 range. This condition is not met for the subtraction-before-multiplication computation order. As illustrated in Figure 14a, the result of the scale multiplication overflows, leading to an incorrect output. In the subtraction-before-multiplication approach, we can only perform multiplication one by one, which is extremely inefficient. On the other hand, with the subtraction-after-multiplication computation order, our progressive group quantization algorithm ensures that the result of the initial multiplication step never exceeds the INT8 range. This allows for fully leveraging the performance benefits of RLP in both multiplication and subtraction.
items.zh: 在此上下文中，我们认为乘法后减法仍然是有利的方法，因为它实现了寄存器级并行性（RLP）。如图14所示，NVIDIA GPU提供vadd4指令，该指令通过单个INT32 ALU操作执行四个INT8加法。然而，没有指令能对四路INT8乘法实现类似效果。因此，为了实现RLP，必须通过向8位缩放因子的最高有效位（MSB）填充24个零来模拟。然而，这种模拟仅在每个INT8乘法的结果保持在INT8范围内时才有效。对于乘法前减法的计算顺序，此条件不满足。如图14a所示，缩放乘法的结果溢出，导致输出错误。在乘法前减法方法中，我们只能逐个执行乘法，效率极低。另一方面，采用乘法后减法计算顺序，我们的渐进组量化算法确保初始乘法步骤的结果永远不会超出INT8范围。这允许在乘法和减法中充分利用RLP的性能优势。

items.en: In our W4A8 kernel, we also employ general techniques for GEMM optimization. On the memory side, we apply multi-stage software pipelining and asynchronous memory copy to better overlap memory access with computation. Additionally, we swizzle the layout of the L1 shared memory to eliminate bank conflicts. To improve L2 cache utilization, we permute the computation partition across different thread blocks, allowing adjacent blocks to reuse the same weight. On the compute side, when the number of input tokens (m𝑚m) is small, we found it beneficial to partition the reduction dimension k𝑘k into multiple slices and reduce the partial sums across different warps in the L1 shared memory.
items.zh: 在我们的W4A8核中，我们还采用了GEMM优化的一般技术。在内存方面，我们应用多级软件流水线和异步内存拷贝以更好地重叠内存访问与计算。此外，我们交错L1共享内存的布局以消除存储体冲突。为改善L2缓存利用率，我们跨不同线程块置换计算分区，允许相邻块重用相同权重。在计算方面，当输入词元数m较小时，我们发现将归约维度k划分为多个切片并在L1共享内存中跨不同线程束归约部分和是有益的。

items.en: Attention accounts for 30-50% of the total LLM runtime, as depicted in Figure 2a. Although the roofline model in Figure 5 suggests that quantizing the KV cache to INT4 should automatically yield a 2×\times speedup over the 8-bit KV baseline, this is not the case in real-world implementation.
items.zh: 注意力机制占LLM总运行时的30-50%，如图2a所示。尽管图5中的屋顶线模型表明将KV缓存量化为INT4应自动比8位KV基线快2倍，但在实际实现中并非如此。

items.en: We start with the KV8-attention decoding stage kernel from TensorRT-LLM as our baseline and replace all static, per-tensor quantized 8-bit KV cache accesses and conversions with their dynamic, per-head quantized 4-bit counterparts. This direct replacement immediately leads to 1.7×\times speedup on L40S, but results in 1.2×\times slowdown on A100 (Table I), compared to the KV8 baseline.
items.zh: 我们从TensorRT-LLM中的KV8注意力解码阶段核作为基线，将所有静态逐张量量化的8位KV缓存访问和转换替换为动态逐头量化的4位对应项。这种直接替换在L40S上立即带来1.7倍加速，但在A100上导致1.2倍减速（表I），与KV8基线相比。

items.en: Once again, our analysis reveals that the devil is in the slow CUDA cores, which are responsible for executing the attention kernels during the decoding stage. While each individual batched GEMV has a computation intensity of 1 MAC / element, the computation intensity escalates significantly for a fused attention kernel that combines all the arithmetics and KV cache updates. As an illustration, naively dequantizing a single INT4 number from the KV cache necessitates 5 ALU Ops. This includes mask and shift operations to isolate the operand, type conversion from integer to floating-point representation, and floating point mul and sub to obtain the final results. It is crucial to note that the roofline turning point for A100 FP32 CUDA cores is merely 9.8 Ops/Byte. That said, the dequantization of KV operands alone already saturates this bound, leading to the surprising observation that the fused KV4 attention kernel can become compute-bound on datacenter GPUs like A100. In fact, similar observations hold in other systems like QuaRot [2] and Atom [44]. Specifically, QuaRot introduces compute-intensive Hadamard transformation [4] in the attention operator, making it hard to achieve real speedup over TRT-LLM-KV8 with 4-bit quantized KV caches.
items.zh: 再次，我们的分析揭示，问题在于缓慢的CUDA核心，这些核心负责在解码阶段执行注意力核。虽然每个单独的批处理GEMV的计算强度为1 MAC/元素，但对于一个融合了所有算术运算和KV缓存更新的注意力核，计算强度显著增加。例如，从KV缓存中朴素地反量化一个INT4数需要5次ALU操作。这包括用于隔离操作数的掩码和移位操作、从整数到浮点表示的转换，以及获得最终结果的浮点乘法和减法。值得注意的是，A100 FP32 CUDA核心的屋顶线转折点仅为9.8 Ops/Byte。也就是说，仅KV操作数的反量化就已经饱和了这个界限，导致一个令人惊讶的观察：融合的KV4注意力核在像A100这样的数据中心GPU上可能变成计算受限的。事实上，在其他系统如QuaRot [2]和Atom [44]中也有类似的观察。具体来说，QuaRot在注意力算子中引入了计算密集的Hadamard变换[4]，使其在使用4位量化KV缓存时难以实现相对于TRT-LLM-KV8的真正加速。

items.en: To mitigate the compute-bound bottleneck, it is important to shift the decoding stage KV4 attention kernels away from the compute-bound region. We accomplish this objective through a bidirectional approach: Firstly, delaying the onset of the roofline turning point, and secondly, concurrently reducing the computation intensity within the fused kernel. For the first part, we replace all FP32 operations in the original TensorRT-LLM kernel with their FP16 counterpart, effectively doubling the computation roof. For the second part, we observe that the arithmetic intensity of dequantization can be significantly reduced to 2 operations per element by applying bit tricks proposed in [20]. Furthermore, we note that simplifying the control logic and prefetching the scaling factors and zero values, thereby simplifying address calculations, contribute to performance improvements. After incorporating these enhancements, we observe a 1.5×\times speedup over TensorRT-LLM’s KV8 kernel on A100.
items.zh: 为了缓解计算受限的瓶颈，重要的是将解码阶段的KV4注意力核移出计算受限区域。我们通过双向方法实现这一目标：首先，延迟屋顶线转折点的出现；其次，同时降低融合核内的计算强度。对于第一部分，我们将原始TensorRT-LLM核中的所有FP32操作替换为FP16对应操作，有效地将计算屋顶翻倍。对于第二部分，我们观察到通过应用[20]中提出的位技巧，反量化的算术强度可以显著降低到每个元素2次操作。此外，我们注意到简化控制逻辑和预取缩放因子及零值，从而简化地址计算，有助于性能提升。在加入这些改进后，我们在A100上观察到相对于TensorRT-LLM的KV8核有1.5倍的加速。

items.en: The QoQ quantization algorithm is implemented using HuggingFace [37] on top of PyTorch [26]. We use per-channel symmetric INT8 quantization on activations, and per-token asymmetric INT4 group quantization on KV cache. “W4A8KV4 g128” refers to the case where QServe used progressive group quantization on weights: per-channel symmetric INT8 quantization followed by asymmetric INT4 quantization with a group size of 128, while “W4A8KV4” is the per-channel counterpart for weight quantization.
items.zh: QoQ量化算法使用HuggingFace [37]在PyTorch [26]之上实现。我们对激活使用每通道对称INT8量化，对KV缓存使用每令牌非对称INT4组量化。“W4A8KV4 g128”指的是QServe对权重使用渐进组量化的情况：每通道对称INT8量化后跟组大小为128的非对称INT4量化，而“W4A8KV4”是权重量化的每通道对应版本。

items.en: QServe serving system is implemented using CUDA and PTX assembly for high-performance GPU kernels. We also provide a purely PyTorch-based front-end framework for better flexibility. For the throughput benchmarking, we perform all experiments under PyTorch 2.2.0 with CUDA 12.2, unless otherwise specified. The throughput numbers reported are real measurements on NVIDIA GPUs. For baseline systems, we use TensorRT-LLM v0.9.0 and latest main branches from QuaRot and Atom as of April 18th, 2024. Paged attention is enabled for all systems except QuaRot, which does not offer corresponding support.
items.zh: QServe服务系统使用CUDA和PTX汇编实现高性能GPU核。我们还提供了一个纯PyTorch的前端框架以获得更好的灵活性。对于吞吐量基准测试，除非另有说明，我们在PyTorch 2.2.0和CUDA 12.2下进行所有实验。报告的吞吐量数字是NVIDIA GPU上的实际测量值。对于基线系统，我们使用TensorRT-LLM v0.9.0以及截至2024年4月18日的QuaRot和Atom的最新主分支。除QuaRot外，所有系统都启用了分页注意力，QuaRot不提供相应支持。

items.en: We evaluated QoQ on the Llama-1 [33], Llama-2 [34], Llama-3 families, Mistral-7B [17], Mixtral-8x7B [18] and Yi-34B [39] models. Following previous literature [8, 12, 44, 2, 38, 23], we evaluated QoQ-quantized models on language modeling and zero-shot tasks. Specifically, we evaluated on WikiText2 [24] for perplexity, and evaluated on PIQA [3] (PQ), ARC [5], HellaSwag [42] (HS) and WinoGrande [29] (WG) with lm_eval [13].
items.zh: 我们在Llama-1 [33]、Llama-2 [34]、Llama-3系列、Mistral-7B [17]、Mixtral-8x7B [18]和Yi-34B [39]模型上评估了QoQ。遵循先前文献[8, 12, 44, 2, 38, 23]，我们在语言建模和零样本任务上评估了QoQ量化模型。具体来说，我们在WikiText2 [24]上评估困惑度，并在PIQA [3] (PQ)、ARC [5]、HellaSwag [42] (HS)和WinoGrande [29] (WG)上使用lm_eval [13]进行评估。

items.en: We compared QoQ to widely used post-training LLM quantization techiniques, SmoothQuant [38], GPTQ [12], AWQ [23], and recently released state-of-the-art 4-bit weight-activation quantization frameworks, Atom [44] and QuaRot [2]. For SmoothQuant, we uses static per-tensor symmetric 8-bit quantization for KV cache following the settings in the TensorRT-LLM [25]. For GPTQ, we use their latest version with “reorder” trick, denoted as “GPTQ-R”. For QuaRot and Atom, we mainly evaluated using Pile validation dataset as calibration dataset. We also report their results with WikiText2 as calibration dataset in gray color. For “W4A8KV4 g128” setting, both QuaRot and Atom does not support progressive group quantization, and thus we evaluated them using ordinary group weight quantization (i.e., each group has one FP16 scale factor). Unsupported models and quantization settings will be reported as NaN.
items.zh: 我们将QoQ与广泛使用的后训练LLM量化技术SmoothQuant [38]、GPTQ [12]、AWQ [23]以及最近发布的最先进的4位权重激活量化框架Atom [44]和QuaRot [2]进行了比较。对于SmoothQuant，我们按照TensorRT-LLM [25]中的设置，对KV缓存使用静态每张量对称8位量化。对于GPTQ，我们使用其最新版本并采用“reorder”技巧，记为“GPTQ-R”。对于QuaRot和Atom，我们主要使用Pile验证数据集作为校准数据集进行评估。我们还报告了它们以WikiText2作为校准数据集的结果，以灰色显示。对于“W4A8KV4 g128”设置，QuaRot和Atom都不支持渐进组量化，因此我们使用普通组权重量化（即每组有一个FP16缩放因子）进行评估。不支持的模型和量化设置将报告为NaN。

items.en: we report the zero-shot accuracy of five common sense tasks in Table III. QoQ significantly outperformed other 4-bit quantization methods. Especially on the Winogrande task, compared to Quarot, QoQ accuracy is 4.82% higher. Compared to FP16, QoQ only introduced 1.03%, 0.89% and 0.40% accuracy loss for Llama-2 at 7B, 13B and 70B size.
items.zh: 我们在表III中报告了五个常识任务的零样本准确率。QoQ显著优于其他4位量化方法。特别是在Winogrande任务上，与QuaRot相比，QoQ准确率高出4.82%。与FP16相比，QoQ在Llama-2的7B、13B和70B规模上仅引入了1.03%、0.89%和0.40%的准确率损失。

items.capEn: Figure 15: QServe significantly outperforms existing large language model (LLM) serving frameworks in batched generation tasks across different LLMs, ranging from 7B to 72B models. It achieves an average speedup of 2.36×\times over the state-of-the-art LLM serving system, TensorRT-LLM v0.9.0, on the L40S GPU, and it is also 1.68×\times faster on the A100 GPU. All experiments were conducted under the same device memory budget (i.e. 80GB on A100 and 48GB on L40S). We omit the geometric mean speedup of Atom since it only supports Llama2-7B. For absolute values, see Table IV.
items.capZh: 图15：QServe在批处理生成任务中显著优于现有的大语言模型（LLM）服务框架，涵盖从7B到72B的不同LLM。在L40S GPU上，它相对于最先进的LLM服务系统TensorRT-LLM v0.9.0实现了平均2.36倍的加速，在A100 GPU上也快1.68倍。所有实验均在相同的设备内存预算下进行（即A100上80GB，L40S上48GB）。我们省略了Atom的几何平均加速比，因为它只支持Llama2-7B。绝对值见表IV。

items.en: We assessed the efficiency of QServe on A100-80G-SXM4 and L40S-48G GPUs by comparing it against TensorRT-LLM (using FP16, W8A8, and W4A16 precisions), Atom (W4A4), and QuaRot (W4A4). The primary metric for system evaluation is the maximum achievable throughput within the same memory constraints, where we use an input sequence length of 1024 and output sequence length of 512. We notice that Atom only supports Llama-2-7B, and QuaRot does not support GQA. Therefore, we skip these unsupported models when measuring the performance of baseline systems.
items.zh: 我们通过在A100-80G-SXM4和L40S-48G GPU上与TensorRT-LLM（使用FP16、W8A8和W4A16精度）、Atom（W4A4）和QuaRot（W4A4）进行比较，评估了QServe的效率。系统评估的主要指标是在相同内存约束下的最大可达吞吐量，我们使用输入序列长度1024和输出序列长度512。我们注意到Atom只支持Llama-2-7B，QuaRot不支持GQA。因此，在测量基线系统性能时，我们跳过这些不支持的模型。

items.en: We present relative performance comparisons in Figure 15 and absolute throughput values in Table IV. We use per-channel quantization for A100 and per-group quantization for L40S. This is because L40S has stronger CUDA cores for dequantization. Relative to the best-performing configuration of TensorRT-LLM, QServe demonstrates significant improvements on A100: it achieves 2×\times higher throughput for Llama-1-30B, 1.2-1.4×\times higher throughput for Llama-2 models, 1.2×\times higher throughput for Mistral and Yi, and 2.4×\times higher throughput for Qwen-1.5. The performance improvements are particularly notable on the L40S GPUs, where we observed a throughput improvement ranging from 1.47×\times to 3.47×\times across all seven models evaluated. Remarkably, despite the L40S’s significantly smaller memory capacity compared to the A100, QServe effectively maintains the same batch size as TensorRT-LLM on the A100. This achievement is attributed to our aggressive 4-bit quantization applied to both weights and the KV cache. By examining Table IV, we clearly observe that serving five of seven models under 34B on L40S with QServe achieves even higher throughput than serving them on A100 using TensorRT-LLM. Our performance gain over Atom and QuaRot on A100 is even more prominent since these systems did not outperform TensorRT-LLM. On L40S, QServe still achieves 10% higher throughput than Atom when running Llama-2-7B, the only model supported by their system despite the fact that we use higher quantization precision. Besides, the accuracy achieved by QServe is much better than Atom, as indicated in Table III.
items.zh: 我们在图15中展示相对性能比较，在表IV中展示绝对吞吐量值。我们对A100使用每通道量化，对L40S使用每组量化。这是因为L40S具有更强的CUDA核心用于反量化。相对于TensorRT-LLM的最佳配置，QServe在A100上显示出显著改进：对于Llama-1-30B实现2倍吞吐量提升，对于Llama-2模型实现1.2-1.4倍提升，对于Mistral和Yi实现1.2倍提升，对于Qwen-1.5实现2.4倍提升。性能改进在L40S GPU上尤为显著，我们在所有七个评估模型上观察到吞吐量提升范围从1.47倍到3.47倍。值得注意的是，尽管L40S的内存容量远小于A100，QServe有效地保持了与A100上TensorRT-LLM相同的批大小。这一成就归功于我们对权重和KV缓存都采用了激进的4位量化。通过检查表IV，我们清楚地观察到，在L40S上使用QServe服务七个34B以下模型中的五个，其吞吐量甚至高于在A100上使用TensorRT-LLM服务它们。我们在A100上相对于Atom和QuaRot的性能增益更加显著，因为这些系统并未超越TensorRT-LLM。在L40S上，尽管我们使用了更高的量化精度，QServe在运行Llama-2-7B时仍比Atom实现高10%的吞吐量，这是他们系统支持的唯一模型。此外，如表III所示，QServe实现的准确率远优于Atom。

items.capEn: Figure 16: Ablation study on quantization techniques used in QoQ and the impact of serving throughput, GPU memory consumption in QServe. The model used here is Llama-2-7B.
items.capZh: 图16：QoQ中使用的量化技术以及服务吞吐量、QServe中GPU内存消耗影响的消融研究。这里使用的模型是Llama-2-7B。

items.capEn: Figure 17: Same-batch throughput comparison between QServe and baseline systems on L40S. We use an input sequence length of 1024 and output sequence length of 512.
items.capZh: 图17：L40S上QServe与基线系统在相同批大小下的吞吐量比较。我们使用输入序列长度1024和输出序列长度512。

items.en: we examine the impact on accuracy of various quantization techniques implemented in QoQ. Our analysis begins with round-to-nearest (RTN) W8A8 quantization on Llama-2-7B (per-channel + per-token). We then lower the quantization precision and apply different techniques step-by-step. For each step, we evaluated the WikiText2 perplexity and end-to-end inference performance on L40S with 64 requests of 1024 input tokens and 512 output tokens. The results are detailed in Figure 16. We see that reducing the weight precision to 4 bits significantly impaired the model performance, though it increased end-to-end processing speed by 1.12×\times and saved 3.5GB GPU memory. Rotating the block input modules helped suppress the activation outliers, resulting in 0.18 perplexity improvement. In addition, minimizing the block output MSE through weight clipping further decreased the perplexity by 0.16. Consequently, our W4A8 configuration has achieved a perplexity comparable to that of W4A16. However, quantizing KV cache to 4 bits again deteriorated model performance by 0.14, although it substantially enhanced the end-to-end inference throughput by 1.47×\times and halved GPU memory usage. To solve this problem, SmoothAttention reduced perplexity by 0.05, without adding system overhead. Progressive group quantization further improved perplexity by an additional 0.02, with only a negligible increase in dequantization overhead. Lastly, activation-aware channel reordering enhanced perplexity by 0.03.
items.zh: 我们检查了QoQ中实现的各种量化技术对准确率的影响。我们的分析从Llama-2-7B上的最近舍入（RTN）W8A8量化（每通道+每令牌）开始。然后我们逐步降低量化精度并应用不同技术。对于每一步，我们在L40S上使用64个请求（1024个输入令牌和512个输出令牌）评估了WikiText2困惑度和端到端推理性能。结果详见图16。我们看到，将权重精度降低到4位显著损害了模型性能，尽管它使端到端处理速度提高了1.12倍并节省了3.5GB GPU内存。旋转块输入模块有助于抑制激活异常值，导致困惑度改善0.18。此外，通过权重裁剪最小化块输出MSE进一步将困惑度降低0.16。因此，我们的W4A8配置实现了与W4A16相当的困惑度。然而，将KV缓存量化到4位再次使模型性能恶化0.14，尽管它显著提高了端到端推理吞吐量1.47倍并将GPU内存使用减半。为了解决这个问题，SmoothAttention在不增加系统开销的情况下将困惑度降低了0.05。渐进组量化进一步将困惑度改善了额外的0.02，反量化开销仅可忽略不计。最后，激活感知通道重排序将困惑度提高了0.03。

items.capEn: Figure 18: The dequantization overhead in QServe is much smaller than that in Atom-W4A4 (up to 90%).
items.capZh: 图18：QServe中的反量化开销远小于Atom-W4A4（高达90%）。

items.en: Dequantization overhead: We measure the dequantization overhead of per-group QServe-W4A8 GEMM and other baselines in Figure 18. Our dequantization overhead is comparable with TRT-LLM-W4A16, but since we perform computation on INT8 tensor cores, we enjoy 2×\times higher throughput.
items.zh: 反量化开销：我们在图18中测量了每组QServe-W4A8 GEMM和其他基线的反量化开销。我们的反量化开销与TRT-LLM-W4A16相当，但由于我们在INT8张量核心上执行计算，我们享受2倍更高的吞吐量。

items.en: Comparisons under the same batches: We demonstrate speedup results under the same batch sizes in Figure 17. For Llama-2-7B, we show that the 1.88×\times speedup over TRT-LLM can be broken down to two parts: 1.45×\times from same batch speedup and 1.3×\times from the enlarged batch size. For larger models like Llama-2-13B, scaling up the batch size and single batch speedup are equally important (1.7×\times improvement).
items.zh: 相同批大小下的比较：我们在图17中展示了相同批大小下的加速结果。对于Llama-2-7B，我们展示了相对于TRT-LLM的1.88倍加速可以分解为两部分：1.45倍来自相同批大小加速，1.3倍来自扩大的批大小。对于像Llama-2-13B这样更大的模型，扩大批大小和单批加速同样重要（1.7倍改进）。

items.en: Improvement breakdown for KV4 attention: We detail the enhancements from attention optimizations in Section Section V-C. Starting with the basic KV4 implementation, which exhibits an A100 latency of 0.48ms for a 64×\times1024 input, the application of bit tricks from [20] reduces the kernel latency to 0.44ms. Further improvements are achieved by simplifying the control flow, which reduces latency by an additional 0.05ms. Subsequently, converting the QK and SV products to FP16 each contributes a 0.03ms latency reduction. Asynchronous prefetching of dequantization parameters at the start of the attention kernel further enhances performance, ultimately reducing the latency to 0.28ms and achieving an end-to-end improvement of 1.7×\times.
items.zh: KV4注意力的改进分解：我们详细介绍了第V-C节中注意力优化的改进。从基本的KV4实现开始，对于64×1024输入，A100延迟为0.48ms，应用[20]中的位技巧将核延迟降低到0.44ms。通过简化控制流进一步改进，延迟额外减少0.05ms。随后，将QK和SV乘积转换为FP16各贡献0.03ms的延迟减少。在注意力核开始时异步预取反量化参数进一步增强了性能，最终将延迟降低到0.28ms，实现了1.7倍的端到端改进。

items.en: Quantization of LLMs. Quantization reduces the size of LLMs and speedup inference. There are two primary quantization strategies: (1) Weight-only quantization [12, 23, 10, 19] benefits edge devices where the workload is memory-bound, improving weight-loading speed. However, for cloud services with high user traffic and required batch processing, this method falls short as it does not accelerate computation in compute-bound scenarios. (2) Weight-activation quantization accelerates computation in batch processing by quantizing both weights and activations [8, 36, 38]. OmniQuant [30] and Atom [44] exploring more aggressive quantizations (W4A4, W4A8) and mixed precision to enhance model quality and efficiency, though these can impact model accuracy and reduce serving throughput. QuaRot [2] further refines W4A4 by rotating weights and activations at the cost of increased computational overhead due to additional transformations required during inference.
items.zh: LLM的量化。量化减少了LLM的大小并加速推理。有两种主要的量化策略：（1）仅权重量化[12, 23, 10, 19]有利于边缘设备，其中工作负载是内存受限的，提高了权重加载速度。然而，对于具有高用户流量和需要批处理的云服务，这种方法不足，因为它不会加速计算受限场景中的计算。（2）权重激活量化通过量化权重和激活来加速批处理中的计算[8, 36, 38]。OmniQuant [30]和Atom [44]探索更激进的量化（W4A4、W4A8）和混合精度以提高模型质量和效率，尽管这可能会影响模型准确率并降低服务吞吐量。QuaRot [2]通过旋转权重和激活进一步改进了W4A4，代价是由于推理期间需要额外的变换而增加了计算开销。

items.en: LLM serving systems. Numerous systems have been proposed for efficient LLM deployment. Orca [40] employs iteration-level scheduling and selective batching in distributed systems. vLLM [22] features virtual memory-inspired PagedAttention, optimizing KV cache management. SGLang [45] enhances LLM programming with advanced primitives and RadixAttention. LMDeploy [7] offers persistent batching and blocked KV cache features to improve deployment efficiency. LightLLM [6] manages GPU memory with token-wise KV cache control via Token Attention, increasing throughput. MLC-LLM [32] utilizes compiler acceleration for versatile LLM deployment across edge devices. TensorRT-LLM [25] is the leading industry solution and the most important baseline in this paper.
items.zh: LLM服务系统。已经提出了许多用于高效LLM部署的系统。Orca [40]在分布式系统中采用迭代级调度和选择性批处理。vLLM [22]具有受虚拟内存启发的PagedAttention，优化了KV缓存管理。SGLang [45]通过高级原语和RadixAttention增强了LLM编程。LMDeploy [7]提供持久批处理和阻塞KV缓存功能以提高部署效率。LightLLM [6]通过Token Attention以令牌方式控制KV缓存管理GPU内存，增加了吞吐量。MLC-LLM [32]利用编译器加速实现跨边缘设备的通用LLM部署。TensorRT-LLM [25]是领先的行业解决方案，也是本文最重要的基线。

items.en: LLM Accelerators. Transformers and LLMs have also generated considerable research interest in domain-specific accelerator design. Several works, such as A3superscript𝐴3A^{3} [14], ELSA [15], and SpAtten [35], have applied pruning techniques to the attention module, while GOBO [41] and EdgeBERT [31] have investigated quantization approaches. Additionally, DOTA [27] introduces a lightweight, runtime detector for omitting weak attention connections, coupled with specialized accelerators for transformer inference. Apart from attention optimizations, STA [11] leverages N𝑁N:M𝑀M sparsity and specialized softmax module to reduce off-chip communication. Moreover, DFX [16] exploits model parallelism and optimized dataflow for low-latency generation. However, these accelerators have yet to be scaled up to recent LLMs with billions of parameters.
items.zh: LLM加速器。Transformer和LLM也引起了领域特定加速器设计的广泛研究兴趣。一些工作，如A3 [14]、ELSA [15]和SpAtten [35]，将剪枝技术应用于注意力模块，而GOBO [41]和EdgeBERT [31]研究了量化方法。此外，DOTA [27]引入了一个轻量级运行时检测器来省略弱注意力连接，并配备了用于Transformer推理的专用加速器。除了注意力优化，STA [11]利用N:M稀疏性和专用softmax模块来减少片外通信。此外，DFX [16]利用模型并行性和优化数据流实现低延迟生成。然而，这些加速器尚未扩展到具有数十亿参数的近期LLM。

items.en: We introduce QServe, an algorithm and system co-design framework tailored to quantize large language models (LLMs) to W4A8KV4 precision, facilitating their efficient deployment on GPUs. On the algorithmic front, we design the QoQ quantization method that features progressive quantization, enabling W4A8 GEMM operations to be executed on INT8 tensor cores, and SmoothAttention, which significantly reduces accuracy loss resulting from KV4 quantization. Correspondingly, in the QServe system, we leverage the protective range established in the first level of progressive quantization to enable INT4 to INT8 dequantization. This process utilizes full register-level parallelism and employs a subtraction-after-multiplication computation sequence. Additionally, we implement compute-aware weight reordering to minimize the overhead associated with pointer arithmetic. As a result, when serving seven representative LLMs on A100 and L40S GPUs, QServe achieves up to 2.4-3.5×\times higher throughput over the industrial standard for LLM serving, TensorRT-LLM.
items.zh: 我们提出 QServe，一种算法与系统协同设计框架，专为将大语言模型（LLM）量化至 W4A8KV4 精度而设计，以促进其在 GPU 上的高效部署。在算法层面，我们设计了 QoQ 量化方法，其特点包括渐进式量化，使 W4A8 GEMM 操作能在 INT8 张量核心上执行，以及 SmoothAttention，显著降低了 KV4 量化导致的精度损失。相应地，在 QServe 系统中，我们利用渐进式量化第一层中建立的保护范围，实现 INT4 到 INT8 的反量化。该过程利用完整的寄存器级并行性，并采用先乘后减的计算序列。此外，我们实现了计算感知的权重重排序，以最小化指针运算的开销。因此，在 A100 和 L40S GPU 上服务七个代表性 LLM 时，QServe 相比 LLM 服务的工业标准 TensorRT-LLM，吞吐量提升高达 2.4-3.5 倍。
